• Creates an interactive web page with animated "Doofus" dots that flee from mouse proximity and play sound effects
  • Features a UI panel for customizing dot count, color mode (solid or rainbow), and selecting audio files from a JSON manifest
  • Implements audio caching to enable instant sound playback and supports overlapping audio effects
    const snd = new Audio(cachedAudioBlob);
    snd.play().catch(() => {});

This HTML page displays animated dots that react to mouse movement by fleeing and playing sound effects. Users can customize the number of dots, choose between solid or rainbow colors, and select different audio files through a JSON-based sound system. The implementation includes audio caching for instant playback and a responsive UI for configuration.
